personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer / Data Architect | Citi VP-Level Data Platforms

summary: Senior Data Engineer and Data Architect with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience, including recent Citi experience building regulated financial-services data pipelines, analytics datasets, reporting layers, and forecasting platforms. Strong hands-on background in SQL, PL/SQL, Python, PySpark, ETL/ELT, data warehousing, dimensional modeling, SQL tuning, data quality, documentation, and production support. Experienced translating complex operational and risk/capacity data into reliable analytics, dashboards, and executive reporting for large-scale enterprise stakeholders.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Designed and operated Python, SQL, Pandas, and PySpark-oriented ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints into curated datasets for analytics, forecasting, operational reporting, and senior stakeholder decision-making.

Built optimized Oracle-backed data models, historical retention structures, reporting tables, and query patterns to support large-scale time-series analysis, capacity planning, and enterprise infrastructure risk visibility.
Developed ML forecasting and analytics workflows using Prophet, scikit-learn, Python, and PySpark to identify capacity bottlenecks up to 6 months ahead and improve infrastructure planning cycles.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data-platform patterns using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Athena, Redshift, EC2/ECS, and IAM concepts to modernize reporting and forecasting workloads.
Migrated heavy analytics and forecasting workloads from on-prem Oracle patterns toward cloud-scale Redshift processing, enabling more scalable parallel analysis and reducing operational friction.
Implemented data validation, reconciliation, cleansing, quality-control checks, and exception-handling routines to improve reliability and trust in executive reporting datasets.
Integrated data from multiple enterprise monitoring sources including BMC TrueSight, CA Wily/APM, and AppDynamics into unified reporting layers for engineering, capacity, and leadership consumers.
Produced technical documentation, runbooks, data dictionaries, operational reports, and dashboard narratives to support production support, handoff, auditability, and stakeholder communication.
Collaborated with infrastructure, application, and operations teams to troubleshoot production issues, optimize SQL/reporting logic, and continuously improve data pipeline reliability.

experience.title: Senior Consultant / CA APM SME
bullets: Served as SME for enterprise APM environments supporting regulated financial-services systems with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Built Perl/Korn Shell and SQL-driven data extraction and reporting scripts that replaced manual performance reporting exports and improved repeatability.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and technical documentation standards adopted across client environments.
Partnered with application, middleware, and operations teams to resolve performance bottlenecks and improve production support workflows.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping-engine platform from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving transaction correctness and performance expectations.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation utilities to compare source and target records across millions of transactions during phased migration cutovers.
Optimized SQL/database access patterns and migration routines to maintain sub-second query latency and reduce infrastructure footprint.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, and cutover support processes to reduce manual effort and improve migration reliability.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer, Billing Interfaces and Data Workflows
bullets: Developed and supported billing, invoicing, settlement, EDI, and reporting workflows using C, C++, Pro*C, PL/SQL, Oracle, COBOL exposure, XML, Perl, Korn Shell, and UNIX/Linux.
Improved billing data-processing performance through SQL/database tuning, memory reduction, throughput optimization, and sequence-related database improvements.
Reverse-engineered undocumented vendor APIs and legacy data interfaces to support integration, troubleshooting, and maintainable technical documentation.
Supported QA cycles, production bug triage, and release readiness for high-volume telecom billing systems.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, PySpark, Perl, Korn Shell, C, C++, Java, XML, JSON, YAML

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity Forecasting Data Platform
projects.description: Built an AI-assisted capacity forecasting and analytics platform transforming operational telemetry into curated datasets, forecasting outputs, dashboards, and stakeholder reports for infrastructure risk planning.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and PySpark-oriented patterns for curated analytics, query optimization, small-file mitigation, and reliable downstream reporting.

projects.name: AI-Assisted Job Search and Data Automation Pipeline
projects.description: Built a Python automation workflow using LLM APIs, JSON artifacts, semantic duplicate checks, quality gates, and repeatable rendering steps to support structured job evaluation, document generation, and application tracking.
